intro: V.I.PASSHOLDER Summer Days — thru Jul 31, 2026. Present AP in My Disney Experience + photo ID.

items.name: Passholder Lounge
items.desc: Morocco Pavilion (former Restaurant Marrakesh). Snacks, water, mint tea, PhotoPass shot, free button. 11AM-7PM.

items.name: 40% Dining Discount
items.desc: Mon-Thu, select spots, food + non-alc only.

items.name: 20% Off Lunch/Dinner
items.desc: Be Our Guest (lunch only), Crystal Palace (lunch+dinner). Mon-Thu.

items.name: 4 Exclusive Drinks
items.desc: Jun1-Jul31. Pint glass + keyring @ Rainforest Café.

items.name: Popcorn Bucket (exclusive here)
items.desc: Chakranadi cart, near Maharajah Jungle Trek. Moved from all 4 parks to AK-only Jun1.

items.name: Standard Discounts
items.desc: 20% merch · up to 20% dining · free parking · 15% golf · PhotoPass print discount.

items.name: Resort Room Discounts
items.desc: Up to 40% off select rooms, most nights May1-Jul29 (4+ nights) · 30% off Swan/Dolphin.
